taskSummary: Seed colleague ResearchOps access records in D1 without sending notification emails and add visible team context for Test Project 1 users.
implementationSummary: Creates active D1 auth user records for named colleagues.
Adds team-scoped role assignments for ResearchOps Core Team users.
Adds project-scoped role assignments for Test Project 1 users.
Adds Home Office Biometrics as a visible team context for Test Project 1 users because current project visibility is team-key based.
Mirrors active Test Project 1 project-scoped role assignments to the Home Office Biometrics team so the current auth context can surface roles and permissions.
Adds audit events recording seeded access and the visible-scope bridge.
Adds a guarded workflow to apply both migrations to the remote researchops-d1 database.
Updates D1 migration ordering documentation from 0021 to 0022.

codexReviewResponse.issue: Project-scoped users would not have a visible team context in the current auth/session model.
codexReviewResponse.resolution: Added 0021 bridge migration that creates Home Office Biometrics team membership and mirrored team-scoped roles derived from active Test Project 1 project-scoped assignments.

residualRisks: Remote D1 is not changed until the workflow runs after merge to main or is manually dispatched with the confirmation inputs.
The visible team bridge is a compatibility measure for the current team-key auth context and can be retired when project-scoped assignments are surfaced directly by the runtime.
The migration seeds access records only; the user must contact colleagues outside ResearchOps.
